item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Seharusnya, hak asasi manusia harus menjadi fondasi dalam semua kebijakan sosial.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing with society-priority but shifts by turn 3 toward rights-as-foundation and by turn 5 frames public-interest-only policy as risking injustice. Agent B stays consistently balanced, arguing gotong royong is mutual support rather than suppression. Agent B turn 6 contains a Chinese-script insertion inside an English sentence.
